name: Ingestion Evolution

---
Use the ingestion-contract-evolution skill to implement the requested contract change.

Deliver:
- Updated schema/event/idempotency code
- Updated focused tests
- Contract-doc updates if behavior changed
- Compatibility notes and validation evidence
